description: ekokrati computes habitat connectivity metrics (PC, IIC, EC(PC), dPC and its decomposition into intra-patch, flux and connector components) for habitat patch networks. Users upload polygon data as GeoPackage or shapefile, set species-specific dispersal parameters, and receive patch importance scores and landscape-level indices. Designed for conservation planners, landscape ecologists and environmental consultants. No installation required.
name: ekokrati
